title: rubus × omissus
intro: Rubus × omissus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family and is characterized by its edible red fruits. The medicinal properties of Rubus × omissus include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of consuming the plant's fruits and leaves include improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Rubus × omissus can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
